title: Xtra Flaky Korean Fish Noodles
description: A jammy and flaky Korean dish from Busan, featuring fish noodles in a savory broth, this recipe is low in fat and can be prepared in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Bring the water to a boil in a large Dutch oven.
Add the kombu sheets to the boiling water and remove from heat.
Let the kombu steep for 5 minutes, then remove and discard.
Add the anchovy paste, gochujang, and soy sauce to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the fish noodles to the pot and cook for 5 minutes, or until they are slightly tender.
Fold the noodles over several times to distribute the sauce and create a flaky texture.
Stir in the chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
